manualEntrySubtitle: Or enter the offer details manually.
analysisFailedBody: We couldn't complete the analysis. Please edit the details and try again.
analysisFailedScreenshotBody: We couldn't read this screenshot. Please upload a valid offer screenshot.
analysisFailedQuotaBody: Screenshot analysis is temporarily unavailable because AI quota is reached. Enter details manually and try again later.
liberatoryTaxHint: Apply a flat income tax rate on turnover.
missingGeminiConfigMessage: To enable screenshot extraction, configure Firebase and deploy the extractOfferFromImage Cloud Function with the GEMINI_API_KEY secret.
stripeReturnBody: Updating your subscription. This can take a few seconds.
signInSubtitle: Analyze delivery offers faster and keep every euro.
passwordLengthError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signInFailedMessage: Unable to sign in. Check your email and password and try again.
registerFailedMessage: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
offerActionFailedMessage: Unable to complete this action right now. Please try again.
offerLocationPermissionRequired: Location permission is required to analyze an offer.
offerLocationUnavailable: Unable to read your current location. Check GPS and try again.
offerLocationTimeout: Location took too long to load. Try again in an open area.
offerLocationUnsupported: This device does not support location for offer analysis.
billingActionFailedMessage: Unable to update subscription right now. Please try again.
deviceActionFailedMessage: Unable to update device right now. Please try again.
vehicleActionFailedMessage: Unable to update vehicle right now. Please try again.
languageSaveFailedMessage: Unable to update language right now. Please try again.
genericActionFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorSessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errorPlanUnavailable: No paid plan is available right now. Please try again later.
errorEmailAlreadyInUse: This email is already used by another account.
errorWeakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters.
errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errorNetworkUnavailable: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errorPermissionDenied: You don't have permission to do this action on this account.
deviceNotRegisteredMessage: This device is not registered on your account yet. Refresh and try again.
noVehiclesMessage: Add a vehicle to start analyzing offers.
historyChartEmptyMessage: Add at least 2 offers to see the chart.
historyChartHintMessage: Use this chart to compare profits above/below the break-even line.
historySummaryTodayMore: Today's offers are more profitable than earlier ones by {amount}.
historySummaryTodayLess: Today's offers are less profitable than earlier ones by {amount}.
historySummaryTodayEqual: Today's offers are about as profitable as earlier ones.
historySummaryNotEnoughHistory: Not enough history to compare today.
extractionFailedMessage: Unable to extract offer details from the screenshot.
mapsAutocompleteUnavailableMessage: Address autocomplete is unavailable. Check the Google Maps API key and Places UI Kit setup.
pickupAddressMissingHint: This screenshot provides only the restaurant name and the customer address. The pickup address can be left empty.
routeVerificationMissingMessage: Select pickup and drop-off from autocomplete to verify the route.
routeVerificationFailedMessage: Unable to verify the route distance. Please try again.
installAppSubtitle: Add Liive Profit to your home screen
installAppRequiredBody: To continue, install Liive Profit and open it from your home screen. We show the install guide automatically.
installAppRequiredNativeBody: To continue, install Liive Profit and open it from your home screen. Tap Install to open the browser prompt.
installAppPromptUnavailable: Install prompt is not ready yet. Wait a moment and try again.
installAppPromptWaiting: Preparing install prompt. Keep this page open for a moment.
incomeTaxEstimatedHint: Estimated default. You can override it.
monthlyHoursRequiredError: Monthly hours are required for hourly allocation.
monthlyDistanceRequiredError: Monthly distance is required for per-km allocation.
monthlyDeliveriesRequiredError: Monthly deliveries are required for per-delivery allocation.
deleteVehicleMessage: This will remove the vehicle and its saved settings. You can add it again later.
vehicleLicensePlateDuplicate: A vehicle with this plate already exists.
plateLookupNotFoundMessage: No vehicle found for this plate.
modelLookupNotFoundMessage: No match found for this brand/model.
profitabilityFailedMessage: Unable to compute profitability. Check your profile settings.
billingManageSubtitle: Change plan, pause cancellation, or schedule cancellation.
billingCancellationSubtitle: Choose whether to keep renewing or stop at the end of this billing period.
billingCancelSuccess: Subscription will cancel at period end.
billingStripePortalSubtitle: Open Stripe to manage invoices, payment methods, and billing details.
offerLimitReachedMessage: You have reached your monthly offer limit. Upgrade to continue.
subscriptionPlansSubtitle: Pick the monthly cap that fits your deliveries.
subscriptionActiveSubtitle: Manage your billing and plan details.
devicesSectionSubtitle: Manage the device linked to your plan
deviceManagementSubtitle: Only one device can be active at a time.
deviceLimitSubtitle: Your plan allows 1 active device. Replace one to continue.
helpIntroBody: Report bugs or issues with screenshots and written details. Our team will review them and keep you updated.
helpDescriptionHint: Steps, expected result, and what actually happened.
helpAudioSubtitle: Record a voice note and we’ll transcribe it into your description.
helpAudioNotSupported: Voice recording isn’t available on this device.
helpAudioPermissionDenied: Microphone permission is required to record voice notes.
helpAudioFailed: We couldn’t record the voice note. Try again.
helpAudioTranscriptionFailed: We couldn’t transcribe the voice note.
helpAttachmentSubtitle: Add screenshots to speed up troubleshooting.
helpAttachmentLimitTrimmed: Added {count} screenshots. Remove one to add more.
helpAttachmentProcessingFailed: Unable to prepare the screenshot. Please try again.
helpTicketSubmitted: Ticket submitted. We’ll keep you posted.
helpSubmissionFailed: Unable to submit ticket. Please try again.
helpSubmissionTimeout: Submission timed out. Check your connection and try again.
helpSubmissionUploadTimeout: Uploading screenshots took too long. Try fewer or smaller screenshots.
helpTicketsLoadFailed: We couldn’t load tickets right now.
helpDelivererStatusNeedsInfoMessage: We need additional information to continue.
helpDelivererStatusFixReadyMessage: A fix is ready and under validation.
